creator: eduardo@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to commit-hook from comment #4)
---
/!\ wrangler-1.19.12_1: Makefile warnings, please consider fixing /!\

Please make sure this port uses the system OpenSSL and consider removing
CARGO_CRATES=openssl-src-111.18.0+1.1.1n (a vendored copy of OpenSSL) from
the build, e.g., by patching Cargo.toml appropriately.
---
